tiktok.caption: Said yes to the protection plan? 88% are NEVER used — retailers pocket 80% as pure profit. Here's what to do instead.

youtube_short.title: Extended Warranties Are a $40B Scam
title_alternatives: Never Buy an Extended Warranty — Here's Why
The Protection Plan Trap Retailers Won't Tell You About
youtube_short.description: That little 'protection plan' question at checkout is one of the most profitable tricks in retail history. Americans spend $40 billion a year on extended warranties — and only 12% are ever used. That means 88 cents of every dollar goes straight to the retailer as pure profit. Here's the kicker: most premium credit cards already include purchase protection for free. Skip the warranty, build a self-insurance repair fund, and keep the $8,000+ you'd otherwise waste over your lifetime. Follow for more money math that actually matters. #personalfinance #moneytips #savemoney #extendedwarranty #financetok

hook_line: You just paid for a warranty you'll never use
